app.title: Migrating a production AI agent to GPT-5.6: 2.2x faster, 27% cheaper
app.author: brryant
app.description: Migrated a production AI agent to GPT-5.6, achieving 2.2x speedup and 27% cost reduction.
proposed_tests: Run a sample query on GPT-5.6 and measure response time
Compare GPT-5.6's performance with GPT-4 on a production workload
Verify the cost reduction by deploying GPT-5.6 in a cloud environment
